message:
Update superpowers to v3.3.1

- Applied writing clarity improvements to brainstorming skill
- Improved text following Strunk's Elements of Style principles
- More direct language, omitted needless words, positive form

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
         "url": "https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git"
       },
       "description": "Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques",
-      "version": "3.2.3",
+      "version": "3.3.1",
       "keywords": ["skills", "tdd", "debugging", "collaboration", "best-practices", "workflows"],
       "strict": true
     },
